fields.name: session_id
fields.label: Session ID
fields.comments: UUID generated client-side at session start

fields.name: user
fields.label: User
fields.comments: Logged-in user who performed the search; null for anonymous

fields.name: query
fields.label: Search Query
fields.comments: The raw search query string entered by the user

fields.name: scrolled_to_results
fields.label: Scrolled to Results
fields.comments: True if user scrolled past the AI summary panel into article results

fields.name: clicked_article
fields.label: Clicked Article
fields.comments: The first article the user clicked from the result list

fields.name: came_back_to_search
fields.label: Came Back to Search
fields.comments: True if user navigated back to the search page after clicking an article

fields.name: reformulated_query
fields.label: Reformulated Query
fields.comments: True if user submitted a new/different query in the same session

fields.name: summary_feedback
fields.label: Summary Feedback
fields.comments: User feedback on the AI-generated search summary

fields.name: created
fields.label: Created
fields.comments: Timestamp when the session was first created

fields.name: outcome_classified
fields.label: Outcome Classified
fields.comments: Set to true once SearchPulseClassifier has processed this session

fields.name: session_duration_seconds
fields.label: Session Duration (seconds)
fields.comments: Wall-clock seconds from session start to session end signal
